name: diecast-org-spine-generator
description: AUTHORING TOOLING ONLY — not a build step, not a test harness. The browser NEVER loads _build/. This seeded generator emits the committed classic-script ../org.js (window.ORG). FR-001's 'no build step' governs OPENING the double-clickable prototype; org.js is committed, so opening stays build-free. Run: npm install && node generate-org.mjs
